headline: Invesco Steps Into Tokenized T‑Bills With Superstate Fund Shift
summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) is taking over management of the Superstate Short Duration US Government Securities Fund (USTB), a crypto vehicle that tokenizes T-bills on blockchain rails. The move brings a blockchain based, real world asset product under Invesco’s umbrella, pairing traditional US government securities with digital token infrastructure. Superstate will continue as a technology partner, while Invesco oversees the fund as an investment product for its clients. For you as an investor,...
